title: Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: The process of inferring the reward function from an expert's demonstrations. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Reinforcement Learning. It opens into Forward and Inverse Reinforcement Learning and AI in Inverse Reinforcement Learning.

related: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
